title: Aloria
description: A simple mod pack for the Aloria server with better performance
body:
This mod pack is for the Aloria server and we have included some mods that will make your game run much smoother we have done this so anyone on any device can play and meet new people 

1. this mod pack contains sodium which helps performance

2. we have also included Modern fix. this does what sodium doesn't

3. there is also a new loading screen mod that our team has made so the game shows you what's really happening 
4. we have created a resorce pack that changes the defualt loading screen to look more Aloria frendly.
